column1: # Lunar occultations of bright stars & planets. mode=loc: local circumstances at one observer from swe_lun_occult_when_loc evaluated with SE_ECL_ONE_TRY (the single lunar conjunction nearest jd_tt): max + contacts C1..C4
column3: obscuration=attr[2] (covered disc fraction). occ_type=0 with all time/attr fields -1 means that conjunction is not an occultation at that observer (beyond the graze limit). mode=glob: next occultation anywhere (swe_lun_occult_when_glob
column4: max only) localized by swe_lun_occult_where (sub-lunar lon/lat + attrs). occ_type: 2=Total
column6: 0=Miss/no-event. central: 1 if SE flags SE_ECL_CENTRAL else 0. Unused numeric fields are -1: for loc rows sublunar_lat/lon=-1; for glob rows lat/lon/elev and c1..c4=-1. jd_tt is the search-start epoch; jd_tt/max_jd/c*_jd are ALL in TDB (jd_ut + swe_deltat). Non-occultable star (Sirius) -> occ_type=0 no-event row (SE rejects it: ecliptic latitude beyond ~7 deg).
